title: pelargonium × versicolor
intro: Pelargonium × versicolor, also known as the Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the family Geraniaceae, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium lanatum. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of colds, sore throats, and fever. The health benefits of Pelargonium × versicolor include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe respiratory tract infections and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health issues.
